name: Secuoya, Grupo de Comunicacion, S.A.
summary: Secuoya, Grupo de Comunicaci√É¬≥n, S.A. creates, produces, and distributes audiovisual content in Spain. The company also provides human resources and technical equipment for various projects; audio and video postproduction services; ENG teams management; technical installations and maintenance; outsourcing; and support and business process outsourcing services. In addition, it offers consultancy, design, and execution of audio-visual project solutions; and supplies images. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Granada, Spain. Secuoya, Grupo de Comunicaci√É¬≥n, S.A. is a subsidiary of Cardomana Servicios y Gestiones, S.L.
